What We Offer

Remote Proctoring
Built for Scale

From live human oversight to AI-driven monitoring, our solutions ensure exam integrity at every step — no matter where your candidates are.

Live Remote Proctoring

A trained proctor monitors each candidate in real time via webcam and screen share, providing immediate intervention when needed. Ideal for high-stakes certifications requiring human judgment.

Record & Review Proctoring

Sessions are recorded and reviewed by qualified proctors after the exam. A scalable, cost-effective approach that maintains rigorous integrity standards without requiring simultaneous monitoring.

AI-Assisted Proctoring

Powered by Certiverse's intelligent monitoring engine, our AI flags suspicious behavior automatically — reducing review time while maintaining a high-confidence security standard for remote testing.

Our Story

From a Team of Five
to a Force of 25.

Founded in February 2024 by Erick Cruz alongside Certiverse owner Ruben Garcia, Five Acts Services Corp. was established as Certiverse's Asia-Pacific regional headquarters, based in Alabang, Muntinlupa.

What began as a tight-knit team of five managing localized remote proctoring sessions has scaled into a robust operation of 25 dedicated professionals — delivering seamless, secure global testing solutions across the region.

Five Acts is part of Certiverse's synchronized global expansion, launched alongside Certiverse's regional offices in (Abstra) Asuncion, Paraguay and Morocco — forming a truly worldwide network built to serve certification bodies at any scale.

Security-First Culture
Every session is treated as high-stakes. Our proctors are trained to uphold the highest standards of exam integrity.
24/7 Operational Readiness
Remote testing doesn't follow business hours. Our team is built to support sessions across time zones, around the clock.
Candidate-Centered Approach
We prioritize a calm, professional experience for test-takers — making sure technical issues never get in the way of a fair exam.
Global Presence

One Network.
Three Continents.

Certiverse's synchronized global expansion means clients anywhere in the world get consistent, high-quality proctoring coverage from a regional team that understands their market.
